serverInfo.name: horse.horse
serverInfo.title: Horse.Horse
serverInfo.description: In-browser runner game exposing its controls to AI agents via WebMCP.

transport.note: Tools are registered via navigator.modelContext.provideContext() once the game loads in a browser. There is no remote MCP endpoint.

tools.name: start_game
tools.description: Begin a new run from the waiting or game-over screen.

tools.name: jump
tools.description: Make the horse jump over an obstacle.

tools.name: get_state
tools.description: Return current score, high score, speed, and game state.
